message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

participant "browser" as browser
participant "listener" as listener
participant "sequence_1" as sequence_1
participant "http_inbound_travelocity" as http_inbound_travelocity
participant "OIDC_IdP" as OIDC_IdP
participant "http_inbound_commonauth" as http_inbound_commonauth
participant "sequence_2" as sequence_2

browser -> listener : SAML login request
activate listener
listener -> sequence_1 : SAML login request
activate sequence_1
browser -> http_inbound_travelocity : SAML login request
activate http_inbound_travelocity
http_inbound_travelocity -> sequence_1 : request
activate sequence_1
note right of sequence_1: SAML request process
note right of sequence_1: OIDC request build
sequence_1 -> http_inbound_travelocity : Redirect to IDP
deactivate sequence_1
http_inbound_travelocity -> browser : Redirect to IDP
deactivate http_inbound_travelocity
browser -> OIDC_IdP : Redirect to IDP
activate OIDC_IdP
OIDC_IdP -> browser : login page
browser -> OIDC_IdP : Submit credentials
OIDC_IdP -> http_inbound_commonauth : ID token
activate http_inbound_commonauth
http_inbound_commonauth -> sequence_2 : ID token
activate sequence_2
note right of sequence_2: OIDC response process
note right of sequence_2: SAML response build
sequence_2 -> http_inbound_commonauth : SAML response
deactivate sequence_2
http_inbound_commonauth -> browser : SAML response
deactivate http_inbound_commonauth
deactivate OIDC_IdP
deactivate listener

@enduml
```
